retry_reason: Not a refcount wrapper — failure to send the WMI command is not a refcount issue; retry policy depends on caller, not on refcount semantics.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to generate and send a WMI command (PNO scan start/stop). The only refcount operation is dev_kfree_skb (put) on the local skb, which is merely error cleanup, not the core purpose of the function.
